person_name: Lucumo (later Lucius Tarquinius Priscus, fifth King of Rome)
person_name_full: Lucumo (later Lucius Tarquinius Priscus, fifth King of Rome)
notes: Fifth King of Rome, originally named Lucumo, an Etruscan who migrated to Rome and took the name Lucius Tarquinius Priscus.

docs.title: Roman History, Book Book 2
docs.author: Cassius Dio
docs.excerpt: But the aforesaid estimate of him did not continue permanently. For upon the death of Marcius he behaved in a knavish way to the latter's two sons and got the kingdom for himself.
